summary: Iteration 5 testing completed - All requested UI fixes verified. Hero section: no purple logo, no dark overlay, video plays directly, ETERNAL HAPPINESS text is white. Testimonials: Video tab shows YouTube thumbnails, tab switching works. Newsletter: white background. Admin panel: Hero Subtitle Color picker, Logo upload with width slider, Deadline Date field in program form all present and functional.

issues: Some graphic testimonial images show as blank/not loading (external URLs from divineirishealing.com may be blocked)

action_items: Consider re-uploading graphic testimonial images to local storage if external URLs are unreliable
critical_code_review_comments: Hero section properly removes overlay and logo - only shows video + text
Hero subtitle color controlled via settings API (hero_subtitle_color field)
Logo settings properly implemented with logo_url and logo_width fields
Deadline date field added to programs for countdown functionality
Tab switcher in testimonials correctly filters by type (video/graphic)
Newsletter section properly uses bg-white class

All data-testid attributes properly set.
